description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by a prominent cylindrical red barrel shroud. The frame is constructed with angular, industrial lines, and the grip is ergonomically shaped with a textured surface for secure handling. The receiver area includes vented slots, likely for heat dissipation, and the trigger guard is squared and substantial, providing ample protection for the trigger. The muzzle is short and compact, suggesting a design optimized for close-quarters use. Visible wear and scuff marks on the surface indicate heavy use or intentional weathering for a rugged appearance.
description: A tactical black shotgun with a red barrel shroud, ergonomic grip, and squared trigger guard, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, red barrel shroud, vented receiver, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, red barrel shroud, and the compact, symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the grip, trigger guard, and barrel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip, vented receiver, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting along the barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with a robust, angular profile and no finger grooves
